steps.title: Read the counterexample
steps.content: Critics treat fine art and fashion as separate: one belongs in exhibitions, the other in changing styles for buyers. Tallbear challenges this because her work appears in a museum and is sold through a boutique.

steps.title: Choose overlap
steps.content: Choice A means triumph, Choice B means give in, and Choice C means move apart. The remaining verb means overlap or cross paths, which fits the claim that fine art and fashion rarely meet. The answer is D.
